task_statement: Durable P1 route/adoption hardening after route-proof 0701a/b/c. Repair the mismatch between Agent-admitted Brick related_boundary_refs and Link classifier resolution; prevent P1c-style hard fan-in closure concern suppression by overbroad top-level advisory; clarify current-ledger-local reason_refs guidance. Use checker-first implementation and official build evidence only.
selection_rule: manual graph because repair spans Link classifier behavior, Brick graph authoring guard, and Agent-facing template guidance; no preset is assumed adequate

nodes.work_statement:
Implement a narrow durable repair from project/brick-protocol/status/kernel/brick-6-route-proof-findings-0701.md. Required outcomes: (1) checker-first coverage for transition_concern_evidence.related_boundary_refs resolving admitted Brick-node prefixes such as brick:<declared-node>, brick-instance:<declared-node>, and brick-boundary:<declared-node> to declared Brick nodes, while building-boundary: remains non-reroute sentinel and garbage refs still HOLD; (2) preserve explicit top-level transition_concern_adoption=advisory behavior for admitted opt-in cases, but add guard/checker coverage so hard fan-in closure graphs do not accidentally use top-level advisory when scoped fan-in source advisory is intended; (3) update Agent-facing Brick template/guidance so reroute-capable related_boundary_refs and adopted transition concern reason_refs are current-ledger-resolvable, with external evidence cited under observed_evidence not reason_refs. Run focused relevant checker(s), py_compile for changed Python, git diff --check, and if feasible a focused route/adoption proof. Return changed_files, commands, observed_evidence, blocked/missing evidence, not_proven. Do not mark P1 complete.

STRICT SCOPE: This is a bounded P1 route/adoption hardening repair. Do not change product/runtime semantics outside transition concern address resolution, graph authoring guard/checker coverage, and Agent-facing guidance for current-ledger-local reason_refs. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli/subagents. Do not store or print secrets/session bodies.

Attack the implementation from the work Brick. Independently reproduce the 0701a prefix mismatch and the 0701b external reason_refs HOLD class if covered. Verify checker-first coverage exists and fails would catch the old behavior. Run focused checker(s), compile/diff checks, and inspect changed files. If any implementation gap remains, return local non-binding transition_concern_evidence with concern_kind implementation_gap targeting the work node.

STRICT SCOPE: This is a bounded P1 route/adoption hardening repair. Do not change product/runtime semantics outside transition concern address resolution, graph authoring guard/checker coverage, and Agent-facing guidance for current-ledger-local reason_refs. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli/subagents. Do not store or print secrets/session bodies.

Attack Brick/Agent/Link boundaries. Verify the repair does not let Agent choose Movement, does not make support a route inventor, does not create new Movement literals, and preserves Link ownership of adoption. Check that graph authoring guard belongs to Brick/support validation, address resolution belongs to Link support classifier, and Agent-facing guidance remains non-binding evidence. If a real boundary gap remains, return local non-binding transition_concern_evidence targeting the work node.

STRICT SCOPE: This is a bounded P1 route/adoption hardening repair. Do not change product/runtime semantics outside transition concern address resolution, graph authoring guard/checker coverage, and Agent-facing guidance for current-ledger-local reason_refs. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli/subagents. Do not store or print secrets/session bodies.

Check evidence integrity. Verify route-proof findings are cited as support evidence only, checker output does not overclaim P1 completion, and changed docs/templates do not turn checker green/model output into source truth. Confirm all adopted concern reason_refs guidance stays current-ledger-local. If evidence is missing, name it under missing_evidence/not_proven.

STRICT SCOPE: This is a bounded P1 route/adoption hardening repair. Do not change product/runtime semantics outside transition concern address resolution, graph authoring guard/checker coverage, and Agent-facing guidance for current-ledger-local reason_refs. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli/subagents. Do not store or print secrets/session bodies.

Synthesize work + all QA bodies. Report observed_evidence, narrowly_proven, not_proven, remaining_delta, parent_goal_delta_status, next_target_candidates. If the repair is not sufficient, return Link-facing non-binding transition_concern_evidence with concern_kind implementation_gap targeting the work node using current-ledger-local reason_refs only. If sufficient for this bounded hardening, set transition_concern_evidence null. Do not mark P1 or the whole goal complete.
